translation_findings.issue: Term 21 ハウジングサービス (Housing Service, customer's own server in vendor's facility) and Term 22 ホスティングサービス (Hosting Service, vendor-owned server in vendor facility) BOTH translate to '主机托管服务' in zh. The two services are semantically distinct in the JP source; sharing a single zh headword erases the distinction students must learn. Suggest Housing -> '主机托管服务（Housing）' or '机房托管服务'; Hosting -> '服务器租用服务（Hosting）'.
組込みシステム definition '特定の機能を実現するシステムである（ハードウェア+ソフトウェア）' is fine, but the OCR source uses bullet form. zh/en faithfully render the parenthetical. No defect, just noting completeness.
